01-project-scaffolding.title: Project Scaffolding — NestJS Monorepo + Prisma + Docker
01-project-scaffolding.notes: All scaffolding complete. Backend builds, tests pass (14/14). All 3 frontend apps build with Vite. Docker compose configured with postgres (pgvector), redis, minio, meilisearch, mailpit.

02-database-schema.title: Database Schema & Prisma Setup
02-database-schema.notes: Full Prisma schema with 11 models (AdminUser, Tenant, TenantUser, ClientUser, Role, Permission, RolePermission, UserRole, RefreshToken, SubscriptionPlan, TenantSubscription, AuditLog), 4 enums, PostgreSQL extensions (uuid-ossp, pgvector, pg_trgm). Idempotent seed with admin user, 3 subscription plans, CRUD permissions for 5 resources, and demo tenant. Build passes, all 14 tests pass.

03-configuration-management.title: Configuration & Environment Management
03-configuration-management.notes: Zod config schema with fail-fast validation, typed AppConfigService, AppConfigModule (global), .env.example with docs, .env.test for test overrides. 42 tests pass, build clean.

04-exception-handling.title: Exception Handling & Error Response Format
04-exception-handling.notes: ErrorCodes + ErrorCodeHttpStatus mapping, AppException extending HttpException, GlobalExceptionFilter (handles AppException/ZodError/HttpException/Prisma/unknown), ZodValidationPipe with field-level errors, ServiceResult.toHttpException(). 90 tests pass, build clean.

05-request-response-envelope.title: Request/Response Envelope & API Conventions
05-request-response-envelope.notes: TransformInterceptor wraps all responses in {success, data, timestamp, traceId} envelope. PaginatedResult class + paginate() utility for paginated responses with pagination metadata. Backend api-response.types.ts + frontend types already aligned. Registered globally in main.ts. 17 new tests (8 interceptor + 9 pagination), 107 total tests pass.

06-logging-infrastructure.title: Logging Infrastructure — Structured JSON, Tracing
06-logging-infrastructure.notes: Pino-based structured logger (JSON in prod, pretty in dev), RequestContext with AsyncLocalStorage, CorrelationIdMiddleware, RequestLoggingMiddleware. 148 tests pass, build clean.

07-multi-tenancy-middleware.title: Multi-Tenancy Middleware — Tenant Resolution
07-multi-tenancy-middleware.notes: TenantResolutionMiddleware resolves from subdomain/X-Tenant-ID/X-Tenant-Slug/JWT (priority order). TenantCacheService with 30s TTL (in-memory, swap to Redis in task 14). TenantScopeInterceptor auto-injects tenantId on write ops. CurrentTenant decorator. Skips admin/auth/health/docs routes. 190 total tests pass, build clean.

08-postgresql-rls.title: PostgreSQL Row-Level Security Policies
08-postgresql-rls.notes: RLS enabled on 6 tenant-scoped tables (tenant_users, roles, role_permissions, user_roles, audit_logs, tenant_subscriptions) with FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY. Policies use app.current_tenant_id session variable for tenant isolation and app.bypass_rls for admin bypass. Prisma extension (withRLS/withRLSBypass) wraps queries in transactions with SET LOCAL. PrismaService exposes .rls (auto from RequestContext), .rlsBypass (admin), and .forTenant(id) methods. 25 new tests (215 total), build clean.

09-authentication-system.title: Authentication — JWT + Refresh + 3 User Types
09-authentication-system.notes: Full auth system with 3 login flows (admin, tenant, client), client registration, JWT access tokens (15m) + refresh token rotation (7d, SHA-256 hashed, max 5 per user). @Public() decorator skips auth, @CurrentUser() extracts JWT payload. GET /me returns user profile with permissions for tenant users. JwtAuthGuard with TOKEN_EXPIRED vs UNAUTHORIZED distinction. 246 total tests pass, build clean.

10-rbac-permissions.title: RBAC & Permissions System
10-rbac-permissions.notes: Full RBAC system: @Roles() and @RequirePermission() decorators, RolesGuard with 30s in-memory permission cache, roles CRUD module with tenant scoping, manage wildcard permission, default system roles (OWNER/ADMIN/MANAGER/MEMBER) seeded per tenant, 20 permissions across 6 resources. 291 total tests pass, build clean.

11-subscription-plan-limits.title: Subscription & Plan Limit Enforcement
11-subscription-plan-limits.notes: Full subscriptions module: Admin CRUD for plans, tenant subscription management, per-tenant overrides. PlanLimitGuard with @PlanLimit() decorator enforces resource limits (users, storage). FeatureGateGuard with @FeatureGate() decorator enforces feature access. Usage counts cached with 60s TTL. Admin bypass for both guards. Seed data updated to match spec (Starter free/3 users, Professional $49/25 users, Enterprise $199/unlimited). 341 total tests pass, build clean.

12-query-parameters-filtering.title: Query Parameters — Filters, Sorting, Pagination, Includes
12-query-parameters-filtering.notes: QueryParameters DTO with types/interfaces, QueryParametersPipe (bracket-notation filter parsing, sort, pagination, includes with allowlists), buildPrismaQuery helper (maps all operators to Prisma where/orderBy/skip/take/include with auto soft-delete filter). 63 new tests (404 total), build clean.

13-rate-limiting.title: Rate Limiting — Redis Sliding Window
13-rate-limiting.notes: Redis sliding window rate limiting using ioredis sorted sets. RedisService (connection manager), RateLimitService (sliding window check with sorted sets), ThrottlerGuard (global APP_GUARD with multi-tier rate limiting), @Throttle() and @SkipThrottle() decorators. Tiers: per-IP (100/60s), auth endpoints (10/60s), upload endpoints (20/60s), per-tenant (1000/60s), per-user (300/60s). X-RateLimit-Limit/Remaining/Reset headers on all responses, Retry-After on 429. Fail-open on Redis errors. X-Forwarded-For proxy support. 27 new tests (431 total), build clean.

14-caching-layer.title: Caching Layer — Redis, Tenant-Aware
14-caching-layer.notes: CacheService with tenant-aware keys (saas:{tenantId}:{namespace}:{key}), default 5min TTL, pattern-based invalidation via SCAN, getOrSet cache-aside pattern. @Cacheable and @CacheEvict decorators with custom keyGenerator support. Platform cache via _platform tenantId. All 452 tests pass, build clean.

15-file-storage.title: File Storage — MinIO/S3, Tenant-Scoped
15-file-storage.notes: StorageService with S3Client (MinIO-compatible, forcePathStyle), tenant-scoped keys ({tenantId}/{folder}/{uuid}-{name}), presigned read/upload URLs (1h default), auto bucket creation on init. UploadsModule with controller (POST upload, POST presigned, GET presigned/:key, DELETE :key), service with file validation (10MB max, MIME type allowlist, extension-MIME matching), tenant isolation (key prefix check). 29 new tests (481 total), build clean.

16-background-jobs.title: Background Jobs — BullMQ + Redis
16-background-jobs.notes: BullMQ with Redis backend. 6 named queues (email, notification, export, cleanup, indexing, ai) + dead-letter queue. JobService for adding immediate/delayed/recurring jobs. BaseProcessor with worker lifecycle, retry tracking, and automatic DLQ routing on final failure. Per-queue retry policies (email: 5 retries, AI: 2 retries, others: 3) with exponential backoff. Scheduled jobs: cleanup-refresh-tokens (daily 2 AM), cleanup-expired-uploads (daily 3 AM). Bull Board dashboard at /api/v1/admin/queues (admin-only). 47 new tests (528 total), build clean.

17-event-system.title: Domain Event System — Async Handlers
17-event-system.notes: EventEmitter2-based event bus (wildcard, dot-delimited). 14 typed domain events (tenant/user/auth/entity/subscription/role) with DomainEvent base class carrying traceId/tenantId/userId from RequestContext. EventStoreService persists events to domain_events table. EventHandlersService with @OnEvent(async:true) handlers for all events. Prisma migration for domain_events table. 53 new tests (581 total), build clean.

18-email-notifications.title: Email & Notification Service
18-email-notifications.notes: EmailService with nodemailer SMTP + BullMQ queue integration (send, sendBulk, sendDirect, renderTemplate). 4 HTML email templates (welcome, password-reset, tenant-invite, plan-upgrade) with variable substitution. Notification model in Prisma schema with userId/userType/type/readAt. NotificationsModule with full CRUD: list (paginated, filterable by read/unread/type), markRead, markAllRead, getUnreadCount — all scoped to userId+userType. EmailProcessor updated to use EmailService.sendDirect. NotificationProcessor creates in-app notifications via Prisma. Push notification stub included. 22 new tests (603 total), build clean.

19-security-hardening.title: Security Hardening — Helmet, CORS, Sanitization
19-security-hardening.notes: Helmet with production CSP, HSTS (1yr, includeSubDomains). CORS with explicit origin allowlist, methods, allowed/exposed headers, 86400s maxAge. SanitizePipe strips all HTML tags from string inputs (global pipe). SecurityHeadersMiddleware adds X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy. Request body size limited to 1MB. ESLint rule bans $queryRawUnsafe/$executeRawUnsafe. 17 new tests (620 total), build clean.

20-health-checks.title: Health Checks & Readiness Probes
20-health-checks.notes: @nestjs/terminus health module. GET /api/v1/health (liveness, always 200). GET /api/v1/health/ready (readiness: PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO, Meilisearch, disk, memory heap checks). Custom HealthIndicators for each dependency. @Public() decorator skips auth. Middleware already skips health paths. 15 new tests (635 total), build clean.

21-audit-logging.title: Audit Logging — Entity Change Tracking
21-audit-logging.notes: AuditService with immutable log() and findAll() methods, sensitive data masking (passwordHash, twoFactorSecret, tokenHash, etc.). AuditInterceptor auto-captures POST/PATCH/PUT/DELETE with entity/entityId/newData/metadata. @Audited() decorator for selective auditing. Tenant-scoped GET /api/v1/tenants/:tenantId/audit-logs and admin GET /api/v1/admin/audit-logs with filtering (entity, action, userId, dateRange) and sorting. 33 new tests (668 total), build clean.

22-search-infrastructure.title: Full-Text & Vector Search
22-search-infrastructure.notes: Meilisearch SearchService (create index, index/remove documents, search with tenant isolation via filterable tenantId). VectorSearchService with pgvector raw SQL (store/remove embeddings, cosine similarity search, HNSW index). Embedding model in Prisma schema with unique constraint on [tenantId, entity, entityId]. SearchIndexSyncService listens to entity.created/updated/deleted events, queues BullMQ indexing jobs. IndexingProcessor updated to use SearchService for index/reindex/remove operations. SearchModule with unified GET /api/v1/search endpoint (fulltext/semantic/hybrid modes). SearchFacadeService orchestrates Meilisearch + pgvector. 33 new tests (701 total), build clean.

23-ai-module.title: AI Module — Vercel AI SDK, Tools, Streaming
23-ai-module.notes: Vercel AI SDK v6 with configurable provider (Anthropic/OpenAI) via AiProviderFactory. SSE streaming chat endpoint at POST /api/v1/ai/chat. 4 AI tools: searchProviders (Meilisearch integration), estimateBudget (weighted allocation), checkAvailability (stub), createPlan (structured output). AiConversation Prisma model for conversation memory. Conversation CRUD endpoints. Feature-gated to ai-planner (Professional+ plans). Stricter rate limit (10 req/min). AI SDK types isolated via dynamic require to avoid TypeScript OOM. SWC builder enabled for NestJS. 28 new tests (729 total), build clean.

24-testing-infrastructure.title: Testing — Jest Unit + E2E + Factories
24-testing-infrastructure.notes: jest.config.ts with moduleNameMapper (@common, @modules, @config), coverage thresholds (70/75/80/80), coverage exclusions (modules, main, DTOs, index). E2E config with 30s timeout. Test DB setup with TRUNCATE CASCADE for all 16 tables. 7 entity factories (Tenant, TenantUser, ClientUser, AdminUser, Role, Permission, SubscriptionPlan) with plain object + DB variants. Test helpers: auth (getAdminToken/getTenantToken/getClientToken), request (authenticatedRequest/tenantRequest), assertion (expectSuccessResponse/expectPaginatedResponse/expectErrorResponse/expectValidUuid/expectTimestamps). E2E harness with health check, auth flow, protected routes, token refresh, and response envelope tests. test:e2e:watch script added. 729 unit tests pass, build clean.

25-coding-standards-validator.title: Coding Standards Validator Script
25-coding-standards-validator.notes: scripts/validate-standards.sh checks all 10 categories: file naming (kebab-case), module structure, DTO pattern (Zod/no class-validator), service pattern (ServiceResult/no throws), controller pattern (@ApiTags/@HttpCode), database schema (@@map/@map/timestamps), test coverage (spec files), circular dependencies, security ($queryRawUnsafe), environment (no hardcoded secrets). Color-coded output with pass/fail/warn. Exit 0 if no failures, exit 1 if any. Integrated with task-runner.sh. 13 passes, 0 failures, 13 advisory warnings on current codebase.

26-docker-compose.title: Docker Compose — Dev + Coolify Production
26-docker-compose.notes: Dev docker-compose.yml with 5 infrastructure services (postgres/pgvector, redis, minio, meilisearch, mailpit) all with health checks. Coolify docker-compose.coolify.yml with full stack: api + 3 frontend SPAs + infrastructure, internal+coolify networks, service_healthy depends_on. Multi-stage Dockerfiles: Dockerfile.api (node:22-alpine build+prod, prisma generate), Dockerfile.web/provider/admin (node:22-alpine build + nginx:alpine serve). Nginx SPA config with try_files fallback, gzip, asset caching, security headers. All compose configs validate, all Dockerfiles pass syntax check.

27-documentation.title: Documentation & CLAUDE.md
27-documentation.notes: Comprehensive CLAUDE.md with full project context, patterns, module guide, commands. API conventions doc with response envelope, query params, error codes, rate limiting, auth details. Architecture guide with system diagram, multi-tenancy strategy, auth flow, request lifecycle, module communication, deployment. Getting started guide with step-by-step setup, verification checklist, troubleshooting.

28-frontend-shared-foundation.title: Frontend Shared Foundation — shadcn/ui, OKLch Theming, Utilities
28-frontend-shared-foundation.notes: All 3 apps (web, admin, provider-portal) have: shadcn/ui with 29 components (Radix + CVA), OKLch theme system with --brand-hue CSS variable (light/dark modes), Tailwind CSS 4 @theme mapping, cn() utility, branding config with applyBrandHue(), useTheme() hook with localStorage persistence and system detection, ThemeToggle dropdown component, Sonner toaster. Path aliases @/* configured in tsconfig + vite. All 3 apps build with 0 errors.

29-frontend-i18n.title: Frontend i18n — Internationalization with i18next
29-frontend-i18n.notes: i18next + react-i18next + browser language detector installed in all 3 apps. English and Amharic translation files with comprehensive coverage. LanguageSwitcher component with globe icon dropdown. Language persists to localStorage with app-specific keys. All 3 apps build with 0 errors.

30-frontend-auth.title: Frontend Auth — Zustand Store, Login Pages, Protected Routes
30-frontend-auth.notes: All 3 apps have: auth-types.ts, auth-schemas.ts (Zod), Zustand auth-store.ts with localStorage persistence (app-specific keys), api.ts with 401 token refresh interceptor + request queue, login-page.tsx (admin: email/password, provider: tenantSlug/email/password, web: email/password + register link), protected-route.tsx with /auth/me verification on mount. Web app has register-page.tsx with password confirmation. All App.tsx updated with auth routing, all main.tsx initialized with initializeApiAuth. All 3 apps build with 0 errors.

31-admin-layout.title: Admin App — Layout, Sidebar, Header, Dashboard
31-admin-layout.notes: DashboardLayout with collapsible sidebar (persists to localStorage), header with mobile Sheet drawer, user menu, language/theme toggles. 8 routes: dashboard, tenants, users, roles, subscriptions, audit-logs, jobs, settings. All i18n'd. Build passes with 0 errors.

32-admin-tenants.title: Admin App — Tenants Management with Data Table

33-admin-pages.title: Admin App — Users, Roles, Subscriptions, Audit, Jobs, Settings

36-provider-pages.title: Provider Portal — Bookings, Reviews, Team, Messages, Calendar

37-web-public.title: Web App — Public Layout, Landing Page, Vendor Search

38-web-dashboard.title: Web App — Client Dashboard, Wedding Planner Tools

39-frontend-shared-components.title: Frontend Shared Components — Data Table, Forms, Hooks
